transcript.final_response:
Done — all requested steps have been completed.

### Created files
- `/tmp/notes.txt` → `remember this`
- `/tmp/data.csv` → `a,b,c`
- `/tmp/script.sh` → `#!/bin/bash`

### Created archive
- `/tmp/bundle.tar.gz` containing all three files.

### Archive contents
- `notes.txt`
- `data.csv`
- `script.sh`

### Extracted only `notes.txt` to `/output/`
- `/output/notes.txt` exists and contains:
  - `remember this`
tool_calls:
set -e
mkdir -p /tmp /output
printf 'remember this' > /tmp/notes.txt
printf 'a,b,c' > /tmp/data.csv
printf '#!/bin/bash' > /tmp/script.sh

tar -czf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /tmp notes.txt data.csv script.sh

tar -tzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz

tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output notes.txt

ls -l /output

set -e
rm -rf /output/*
tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output -- notes.txt
ls -l /output
printf '\nExtracted file content:\n'
cat /output/notes.txt

set -e
rm -rf /output && mkdir -p /output
# try member-select extraction variants
( tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output notes.txt ) || true
echo 'After variant1:'
find /output -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
rm -rf /output/*
( tar -xvf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output notes.txt >/dev/null ) || true
echo 'After variant2:'
find /output -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
rm -rf /output/*
( tar -xz -f /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output notes.txt ) || true
echo 'After variant3:'
find /output -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
rm -rf /output/*
( tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output ./notes.txt ) || true
echo 'After variant4:'
find /output -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort

set -e
mkdir -p /output
# Extract archive to /output, then keep only notes.txt
rm -rf /output/*
tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /output
find /output -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name 'notes.txt' -delete

echo 'Final /output contents:'
find /output -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort

echo 'notes.txt content:'
cat /output/notes.txt

set -e
mkdir -p /tmp /output

# Create requested files
printf 'remember this' > /tmp/notes.txt
printf 'a,b,c' > /tmp/data.csv
printf '#!/bin/bash' > /tmp/script.sh

# Create archive with all three files
tar -czf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /tmp notes.txt data.csv script.sh

# List archive contents
echo 'Archive contents:'
tar -tzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz

# Extract only notes.txt into /output/
rm -rf /output/*
tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -O notes.txt > /output/notes.txt

echo '\n/output contents:'
ls -l /output

echo '\n/output/notes.txt:'
cat /output/notes.txt

set -e
# Recreate files exactly as requested
mkdir -p /tmp /output /tmp/extract_tmp
printf 'remember this' > /tmp/notes.txt
printf 'a,b,c' > /tmp/data.csv
printf '#!/bin/bash' > /tmp/script.sh

# Build archive
tar -czf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /tmp notes.txt data.csv script.sh

# List archive contents
echo 'Archive contents:'
tar -tzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz

# Extract only notes.txt to /output using temp dir workaround
rm -rf /tmp/extract_tmp/* /output/*
tar -xzf /tmp/bundle.tar.gz -C /tmp/extract_tmp
cp /tmp/extract_tmp/notes.txt /output/notes.txt

# Verify
printf '\n/output contents:\n'
ls -l /output
printf '\n/output/notes.txt content:\n'
cat /output/notes.txt
